LanguageData.Exotic_Normal.label: Exotic energy cell
LanguageData.Exotic_Normal.description: The exotic energy cell does a funni.
LanguageData.Exotic_Hipower.label: Overcharged exotic energy cell
LanguageData.Exotic_Hipower.description: Overcharge the energy cell to increase its power output at the cost of making it unstable and volatile. Its effects are weapon dependent, it is also usually less accurate than thr regular version.
